descriptionText: Bali Catsmart for Sale 2023Introducing the Bali Catsmart 2023, a modern catamaran produced by the renowned Catana Group, designed by Xavier Fay. The deck features several amenities for enhanced enjoyment:Complete Bow Cushions: For relaxation and sunbathing. Cockpit Table: Perfect for dining and gatherings. Crew Cabin: 1 crew cabin with a bathroom for the skipper. Bathrooms: 2 electric toilets with freshwater supply. Showers: 2 shower stalls for convenience. Galley Appliances: Stove: Yes Oven: Yes Refrigerator: Front-loading fridge with freezer. Additional Features: Cabin fans, saltwater pump in the galley, and anchor locker.Engine and PropulsionThe Bali Catsmart is equipped with two inboard diesel engines, providing reliable power for cruising:Number of Engines: 2 Engine Type: Inboard diesel Engine Model: Yanmar 3YM30AE Power: 30 hp each Year of Engines: 2023 Fuel Tank Capacity: 2 tanks totaling 200 liters Transmission: S-drive setup Steering: Wheel steering Maintenance: Engines regularly serviced.Navigation and Safety EquipmentNavigating is made easy with advanced instruments:Autopilot: Yes VHF Radio: Yes Echo Sounder: Yes Log: Yes Tridata: Yes Compass: Yes Stereo System: Yes Plotter: Yes Wind Instrument: Yes (Raymarine)Electrical and Water SystemsThe Bali Catsmart is equipped with comprehensive electrical systems:Voltage: 12/220V Batteries: 4 + 2 AGM batteries Total Amperage: 760 Ah (560 Ah for services; 200 Ah for engines) Water Tanks: 2 tanks totaling 660 liters (plastic) Pumps: 4 bilge pumps (2 manual, 2 electric) Charger: 70 Amp Boiler: Yes Freshwater System: Yes External Shower: Yes Additional: 1600W inverter, solar panels.Additional FeaturesMast: Aluminum. Winches: 3 with a roller furler. Sails: Dacron mainsail with full battens and a solent. Tender: Highfield included, with an outboard motor. Anchoring Gear: Includes an anchor with 70 meters of chain and 4 mooring lines. Liferaft: Valid for 10 people, expires in 2027. Fenders: 6 included.The Bali Catsmart 2023 offers a great opportunity to enjoy comfortable and stylish sailing. With its modern design and good condition, it’s ready for your next adventure. descriptionHtml:
Bali Catsmart for Sale 2023

Introducing the Bali Catsmart  2023, a modern catamaran produced by the renowned Catana Group, designed by Xavier Fay. This vessel is currently located in Sardinia and is in good condition, making it a perfect choice for both experienced sailors and newcomers alike. With its thoughtful design and spacious layout, the Bali Catsmart For Sale 2023 is well-suited for comfortable cruising and socializing.

Key Specifications

Model: Bali Catsmart
Flag: Italian
Year Built: 2023
Designer: Xavier Fay
Overall Length: 12.08 m
Displacement: 9,000 kg
Number of Owners: 1
Registration: Registered vessel
Safety Certificate Expiry: 2031
Capacity: 10 persons
CE Marking: A

Deck and Hull

The exterior of the Bali Catsmart boasts a sleek white fiberglass hull, which is both durable and aesthetically pleasing. The deck features several amenities for enhanced enjoyment:

Complete Bow Cushions: For relaxation and sunbathing.
Cockpit Table: Perfect for dining and gatherings.
Bimini: Sunshade on the bow and carbon pole awning on the aft.
Lighting: Courtesy lights for evening ambiance.
BBQ: Convenient for outdoor cooking.

Interior

The spacious interior is thoughtfully designed for comfort:

Cabins: 4 double cabins, ideal for family or friends.
Crew Cabin: 1 crew cabin with a bathroom for the skipper.
Bathrooms: 2 electric toilets with freshwater supply.
Showers: 2 shower stalls for convenience.
Galley Appliances:
Stove: Yes
Oven: Yes
Refrigerator: Front-loading fridge with freezer.
Additional Features: Cabin fans, saltwater pump in the galley, and anchor locker.

Engine and Propulsion

The Bali Catsmart is equipped with two inboard diesel engines, providing reliable power for cruising:

Number of Engines: 2
Engine Type: Inboard diesel
Engine Model: Yanmar 3YM30AE
Power: 30 hp each
Year of Engines: 2023
Fuel Tank Capacity: 2 tanks totaling 200 liters
Transmission: S-drive setup
Steering: Wheel steering
Maintenance: Engines regularly serviced.

Navigation and Safety Equipment

Navigating is made easy with advanced instruments:

Autopilot: Yes
VHF Radio: Yes
Echo Sounder: Yes
Log: Yes
Tridata: Yes
Compass: Yes
Stereo System: Yes
Plotter: Yes
Wind Instrument: Yes (Raymarine)

Electrical and Water Systems

The Bali Catsmart is equipped with comprehensive electrical systems:

Voltage: 12/220V
Batteries: 4 + 2 AGM batteries
Total Amperage: 760 Ah (560 Ah for services; 200 Ah for engines)
Water Tanks: 2 tanks totaling 660 liters (plastic)
Pumps: 4 bilge pumps (2 manual, 2 electric)
Charger: 70 Amp
Boiler: Yes
Freshwater System: Yes
External Shower: Yes
Additional: 1600W inverter, solar panels.

Additional Features

Mast: Aluminum.
Winches: 3 with a roller furler.
Sails: Dacron mainsail with full battens and a solent.
Tender: Highfield included, with an outboard motor.
Anchoring Gear: Includes an anchor with 70 meters of chain and 4 mooring lines.
Liferaft: Valid for 10 people, expires in 2027.
Fenders: 6 included.

The Bali Catsmart 2023 offers a great opportunity to enjoy comfortable and stylish sailing. With its modern design and good condition, it’s ready for your next adventure. For more information or to schedule a viewing, please get in touch.
